gist.headline: Notes from the cloud
gist.blurb: Baiye AI just landed in our community showcase! It's a slick cloud note-taking app that weaves AI writing and image generation right into your Markdown.
gist.summary: Added baiye-ai.com, a cloud-based AI note-taking application featuring Markdown support and integrated AI generation, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Baiye AI in our apps directory and see how it leverages Pollinations for seamless AI writing and image creation.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a cloud-based note-taking app that uses Markdown. Visuals should include a notebook, floating cloud elements, Markdown symbols, and the Pollinations bee writing or organizing notes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, writing in a glowing digital notebook with floating cloud elements and Markdown symbols around it. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
